name: Force Protection Video Equipment Corp.
summary: Force Protection Video Equipment Corp., a data technology company that provides tools and services to identify and reach consumers for the purpose of marketing and advertising communication. The company offers a consumer based mobile application that allows consumers to own and earn from their digital data. Its consumer-based platform and technologies assists clients in identifying consumers and consumers' characteristics across various channels in order to discover new and measurable opportunities associated with advertising campaigns; and gaining insight into the activities of customers. The company also provides a consumer based mobile application that allows consumers to own and earn from their digital data. In addition, it sells proprietary consumer data and digital advertising campaigns. The company is headquartered in Westlake Village, California. Force Protection Video Equipment Corp. is a subsidiary of SRAX, Inc.
